title: centaurium breviflorum
intro: Centaurium breviflorum, also known as Short-flowered Centaury, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Gentianaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurium breviflorum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit potential antiviral properties. Centaurium breviflorum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or dried extract for use in herbal remedies.
